channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
item.description: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.

item.title: Stock futures tick higher as Wall Street gears up for SpaceX’s historic IPO: Live updates
item.description: Elon Musk's rocket maker is set to debut on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest IPO in history.

item.title: Oil prices fall on hopes of U.S.-Iran deal despite Tehran pushback
item.description: Oil prices fell on Friday after U.S. President Donald Trump said Washington had reached a framework agreement with Iran, raising hopes that tensions in the Middle East could ease.

item.title: A Chinese start-up's unfolding dilemma exposes cracks in Beijing's tech funding machine
item.description: While the U.S. channels support to tech winners indirectly via incentives, Chinese governments at every level take direct equity stakes.

item.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
item.description: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.

item.title: Pimco is warning about a spike in defaults — How it says income investors should position portfolios
item.description: Pimco is warning fixed-income investors to stay away from lower-quality credit, but sees plenty of opportunities in high-quality assets.

item.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
item.description: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.

item.title: Trump claims Iran war settled 'subject to finalization,' expects signing in 'next few days'
item.description: Hours earlier, Trump warned that the U.S. would attack Iran "VERY HARD TONIGHT" and soon take over Iran's oil infrastructure assets, including Kharg Island.

item.title: Trump picks former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton as national intelligence director
item.description: Trump's announcement came after House Democrats' objections to his pick of Bill Pulte as acting chief ensured that a key national security tool expires Friday.

item.title: Warren questions SpaceX IPO oversight in new letter to stock indexes
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren seeking answers on changes to index provider waiting periods, protections for retail investors, in a letter obtained first by CNBC.

item.title: SpaceX IPO won’t ‘break’ the bull market. But investors are worried about what comes next
item.description: As far as Wall Street is concerned, the stock market has what it takes to absorb the new supply.

item.title: SpaceX soon-to-be millionaires are set to spend big on luxury homes, watches and private jet travel
item.description: SpaceX employees have to wait to sell their shares, but many are already planning how to spend their windfalls.

item.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: Oil prices fell and the Dow Industrials soared more than 900 points Thursday after President Trump said the U.S. will soon sign a deal with Iran.

item.title: What energy insiders in DC are saying about oil prices and a possible Iran deal
item.description: Brian Sullivan shares his insight from the sidelines of the Global Energy Forum in Washington, DC.

item.title: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor
item.description: The yellow metal is at its lowest level of the year as potential interest rate increases and faltering technical signals weigh on prices.

item.title: Oil tanker CEO sees Hormuz ship traffic quickly increasing if U.S. and Iran reach a deal
item.description: Many shipowners are just waiting for the threat assessment to be downgraded before crossing Hormuz, Frontline CEO Lars Barstad said.

item.title: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
item.description: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.

item.title: Ahead of SpaceX IPO, Elon Musk addresses ASML employees as part of push into chip manufacturing
item.description: Elon Musk called ASML a great company in a fireside chat with CEO Christophe Fouquet, as the SpaceX CEO gears up to go big in chip manufacturing.

item.title: Ex-Andreessen Horowitz partner slams his old firm, other VCs for 'political infiltration' around AI
item.description: John O'Farrell, former partner at Andreessen Horowitz, says the PAC Leading the Future, backed by his old firm, is trying to "intimidate politicians."

item.title: Iran threatens Elon Musk's companies in Middle East: Iranian state media
item.description: Iran will consider all of Elon Musk's companies in the Middle East as military targets as it retaliates against the U.S., Iranian state media reported.

item.title: Eaton moves one step closer to becoming a cleaner bet on the AI boom
item.description: Auto parts manufacturer Dana has agreed to combine with Eaton's Mobility business in a deal that values the unit at $5.1 billion.

item.title: Food prices continue to rise. 8 money moves to cut costs at the grocery store
item.description: Food shopping can be expensive. Here are 8 ways to save money during your next grocery run.

item.title: Nearly 7 million student loan borrowers remain in defunct Biden-era payment plan: Trump official
item.description: Millions of student loan borrowers who've lingered in the SAVE plan are at risk of getting billed unaffordable payments and eventually falling into default.

item.title: Insurance stocks — especially one name — are about to break out, charts show
item.description: Jay Woods of Freedom Capital Markets says insurance stocks have been trending sideways for years but charts show that is changing.

item.title: Healthy Returns: CVS Health executives on reducing healthcare's biggest pain points
item.description: CVS Health execs discuss how the company is using AI and other technologies to reduce administrative burdens and deliver more proactive care experiences.

item.title: SpaceX to close above $2 trillion market cap on its debut, prediction market traders say
item.description: Traders on Polymarket think it's likely SpaceX will join a group of just six companies with a market value beyond $2 trillion.

item.title: CNBC Sport: The plan for this year's World Cup to revolutionize Major League Soccer
item.description: MLS Commissioner Don Garber is banking on this year's World Cup to change the trajectory of American soccer.

item.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona to support its AI coding assistant, Codex
item.description: Ona's technology will allow OpenAI's coding assistant, Codex, to take on longer-running tasks, OpenAI said.

item.title: Coinbase launches tool to let AI agents manage trading and payments
item.description: Coinbase is betting that AI agents will become the primary interface for people's financial activity.

item.title: Waymo launches premier subscription tier for $29.99 a month, starting in select cities
item.description: Waymo is offering a new subscription tier for power users, starting in San Francisco, Los Angeles and Phoenix
